requirement_topic.en: Product Safety, Performance & Market Access Certification
requirement_topic.zh: 产品安全、性能与市场准入认证
requirement_topic.zht: 產品安全、性能與市場准入認證

summary.en: Water-electrolysis hydrogen generators sold in the US must comply with ISO 22734 (Hydrogen Generators Using Water Electrolysis Process — Industrial, Commercial and Residential Applications) as the internationally recognised design and safety standard for the equipment. Hydrogen purity must meet ISO 14687 (Hydrogen Fuel — Product Specification), with Grade D (99.9 mol%) as the minimum for general industrial use and Grade E (99.999 mol%) for fuel-cell-vehicle applications. Before market placement, the unit must be listed by a Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory (NRTL) — typically to a US or binational standard such as UL 2267, ANSI/CGA G-5.4, or a nationally recognised adaptation of ISO 22734 — as required by OSHA 29 CFR 1910.303 and adopted electrical and fire codes. Installation must comply with NFPA 2 (Hydrogen Technologies Code, 2023 edition) and the local Authority Having Jurisdiction (AHJ) must issue a permit. Some states impose additional hydrogen-specific rules (e.g. California Fire Code Chapter 58). [UNVERIFIED: NRTL acceptance of ISO 22734 directly versus a US-specific adaptation varies by laboratory and AHJ; confirm with the applicable NRTL]
summary.zh: 在美国销售的水电解制氢设备须符合 ISO 22734《水电解制氢装置——工业、商业及住宅应用》，该标准是该类设备设计与安全的国际认可标准。氢气纯度须满足 ISO 14687《氢燃料——产品规范》，一般工业用途最低为 D 级（99.9 mol%），燃料电池车辆应用须达 E 级（99.999 mol%）。设备上市前须经国家认可测试实验室（NRTL）认证，通常依据 UL 2267、ANSI/CGA G-5.4 或经国家认可的 ISO 22734 改编版本，此要求源自 OSHA 29 CFR 1910.303 及已采纳的电气和消防法规。安装须符合 NFPA 2《氢气技术规范》（2023版），并须取得地方主管机构（AHJ）颁发的许可证。部分州另行制定了氢气专项规定（如加利福尼亚州消防法典第 58 章）。[UNVERIFIED: NRTL 直接接受 ISO 22734 还是要求美国特定改编版本，因实验室和 AHJ 而异；须向相关 NRTL 确认]
summary.zht: 在美國銷售的水電解製氫設備須符合 ISO 22734《水電解製氫裝置——工業、商業及住宅應用》，該標準是該類設備設計與安全的國際認可標準。氫氣純度須滿足 ISO 14687《氫燃料——產品規範》，一般工業用途最低為 D 級（99.9 mol%），燃料電池車輛應用須達 E 級（99.999 mol%）。設備上市前須經國家認可測試實驗室（NRTL）認證，通常依據 UL 2267、ANSI/CGA G-5.4 或經國家認可的 ISO 22734 改編版本，此要求源自 OSHA 29 CFR 1910.303 及已採納的電氣和消防法規。安裝須符合 NFPA 2《氫氣技術規範》（2023版），並須取得地方主管機構（AHJ）頒發的許可證。部分州另行制定了氫氣專項規定（如加利福尼亞州消防法典第 58 章）。[UNVERIFIED: NRTL 直接接受 ISO 22734 還是要求美國特定改編版本，因實驗室和 AHJ 而異；須向相關 NRTL 確認]

standards_or_laws: ISO 22734:2019 — Hydrogen Generators Using Water Electrolysis Process: Industrial, Commercial and Residential Applications
ISO 14687:2019 — Hydrogen Fuel: Product Specification
UL 2267 — Standard for Fuel Cell Power Systems for Installations (covers hydrogen generation sub-systems) [UNVERIFIED: scope overlap with electrolyzers varies; confirm with NRTL]
ANSI/CGA G-5.4 — Standard for Hydrogen Piping Systems at Consumer Locations
OSHA 29 CFR 1910.303 — Electrical Standards (requires NRTL listing for electrical equipment)
NFPA 2 (2023) — Hydrogen Technologies Code
NFPA 70 / NEC Article 706 — National Electrical Code (electrical installation of hydrogen generation systems)
ASME Section VIII Division 1 — Pressure Vessel Code (for pressure-bearing components if applicable)

summary.en: In China, water-electrolysis hydrogen generators are designed and tested against GB/T 19774 (Water Electrolysis Hydrogen Production Equipment — General Technical Requirements) and GB/T 37244 (Proton Exchange Membrane Water Electrolysis Equipment for Hydrogen Production). Hydrogen purity requirements are specified in GB/T 37244 and relevant product standards. Pressure vessels in the system must comply with TSG 21 (Safety Technology Supervision Regulation for Stationary Pressure Vessels) and bear the Chinese pressure vessel safety mark. Products subject to the CCC catalogue require mandatory certification; hydrogen-generation equipment itself is not currently listed under the CCC mandatory catalogue but may be subject to special equipment inspection by SAMR. [UNVERIFIED: CCC applicability to integrated electrolyzer units should be confirmed with SAMR / CNCA]
summary.zh: 在中国，水电解制氢设备按 GB/T 19774《水电解制氢设备通用技术要求》及 GB/T 37244《质子交换膜水电解制氢设备》进行设计和测试。氢气纯度要求见 GB/T 37244 及相关产品标准。系统中的承压容器须符合 TSG 21《固定式压力容器安全技术监察规程》并取得中国压力容器安全标志。列入 CCC 目录的产品须强制认证；制氢设备本身目前未纳入 CCC 强制目录，但可能须经市场监管总局特种设备检验。[UNVERIFIED: CCC 对一体化电解槽设备的适用性须向市场监管总局/国家认证认可监督管理委员会确认]
summary.zht: 在中國，水電解製氫設備按 GB/T 19774《水電解製氫設備通用技術要求》及 GB/T 37244《質子交換膜水電解製氫設備》進行設計和測試。氫氣純度要求見 GB/T 37244 及相關產品標準。系統中的承壓容器須符合 TSG 21《固定式壓力容器安全技術監察規程》並取得中國壓力容器安全標誌。列入 CCC 目錄的產品須強制認證；製氫設備本身目前未納入 CCC 強制目錄，但可能須經市場監管總局特種設備檢驗。[UNVERIFIED: CCC 對一體化電解槽設備的適用性須向市場監管總局／國家認證認可監督管理委員會確認]

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19774-2005 — Water Electrolysis Hydrogen Production Equipment: General Technical Requirements
GB/T 37244-2018 — Proton Exchange Membrane Water Electrolysis Equipment for Hydrogen Production
TSG 21-2016 — Safety Technology Supervision Regulation for Stationary Pressure Vessels (SAMR)
GB 150-2011 — Pressure Vessels (design standard)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (3C) [UNVERIFIED: applicability to standalone electrolyzer units]

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 19774 and GB/T 37244 certifications are not accepted as equivalent to ISO 22734 NRTL listing in the US. The US requires a complete certification stack: ISO 22734 (or equivalent US-adapted standard) tested and listed by an OSHA-recognised NRTL, plus ASME-stamped pressure vessels for applicable pressure-bearing components, NFPA 2 installation compliance, and AHJ permit. Chinese GB/T standards and SAMR special-equipment inspection carry no mutual recognition in the US. A Chinese electrolyzer exporter must engage an NRTL (e.g. UL, CSA, TUV) from scratch for US listing, and the ASME stamp process for pressure vessels adds further cost and lead time with no Chinese-approval shortcut.
gap.zh: 中国 GB/T 19774 和 GB/T 37244 认证不被美国视为等同于 ISO 22734 NRTL 认证。美国要求完整认证组合：ISO 22734（或等效美国改编标准）须经 OSHA 认可的 NRTL 测试认证，承压部件须取得 ASME 钢印，安装须符合 NFPA 2，并须取得 AHJ 许可证。中国 GB/T 标准及市场监管总局特种设备检验在美国不享有互认地位。中国电解槽出口商须从头委托 NRTL（如 UL、CSA、TUV）进行美国认证，承压容器的 ASME 钢印流程还将增加额外费用和周期，中国现有审批资质无法缩短该流程。
gap.zht: 中國 GB/T 19774 和 GB/T 37244 認證不被美國視為等同於 ISO 22734 NRTL 認證。美國要求完整認證組合：ISO 22734（或等效美國改編標準）須經 OSHA 認可的 NRTL 測試認證，承壓部件須取得 ASME 鋼印，安裝須符合 NFPA 2，並須取得 AHJ 許可證。中國 GB/T 標準及市場監管總局特種設備檢驗在美國不享有互認地位。中國電解槽出口商須從頭委託 NRTL（如 UL、CSA、TUV）進行美國認證，承壓容器的 ASME 鋼印流程還將增加額外費用和週期，中國現有審批資質無法縮短該流程。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NRTL listing required by OSHA 29 CFR 1910.303 and adopted electrical codes; NFPA 2 compliance and AHJ permit required before installation; ASME stamp mandatory for pressure vessels under applicable pressure ratings
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary (GB/T 19774, GB/T 37244 are recommended standards); Mandatory for pressure vessels under TSG 21 (SAMR special equipment)

compliance_verdict.en: A Chinese-manufactured water electrolyzer entering the US market must obtain NRTL listing to ISO 22734 (or an accepted US-adapted equivalent), secure ASME stamps for pressure-bearing components, comply with NFPA 2, and obtain AHJ permits — a certification pathway entirely separate from Chinese GB/T and TSG approvals, with no mutual recognition. This information is provided for general reference only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 中国制造的水电解制氢设备进入美国市场，须取得基于 ISO 22734（或经认可的美国改编等效标准）的 NRTL 认证、承压部件的 ASME 钢印，并符合 NFPA 2 及取得 AHJ 许可证——该认证路径与中国 GB/T 和 TSG 审批完全独立，不存在互认机制。本信息仅供一般参考，不构成法律或合规建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 中國製造的水電解製氫設備進入美國市場，須取得基於 ISO 22734（或經認可的美國改編等效標準）的 NRTL 認證、承壓部件的 ASME 鋼印，並符合 NFPA 2 及取得 AHJ 許可證——該認證路徑與中國 GB/T 和 TSG 審批完全獨立，不存在互認機制。本資訊僅供一般參考，不構成法律或合規建議。

requirement_topic.en: IRA Section 45V Clean Hydrogen Tax Credit and Buy America Requirements (Commercial Demand Drivers)
requirement_topic.zh: 《通货膨胀削减法》第 45V 条清洁氢生产税收抵免及美国制造要求（商业需求驱动因素）
requirement_topic.zht: 《通貨膨脹削減法》第 45V 條清潔氫生產稅收抵免及美國製造要求（商業需求驅動因素）

summary.en: IRA Section 45V (Inflation Reduction Act of 2022, Pub. L. 117-169) establishes a Clean Hydrogen Production Tax Credit of up to USD 3.00 per kilogram of qualified clean hydrogen produced at a qualified facility placed in service after 2022. The credit tier depends on lifecycle greenhouse-gas emissions intensity: Tier 1 (less than 0.45 kgCO2e/kgH2) qualifies for the full USD 3.00/kg; higher-emission tiers receive lower credits. Hydrogen must be produced for sale or use in a qualified trade or business. Treasury and IRS issued final regulations (T.D. 10026, January 2025) specifying the lifecycle emissions methodology (45VH2-GREET model) and energy-attribute certificate (EAC) requirements for electrolytic hydrogen. Separately, the Buy America Act (41 U.S.C. 8301-8305) and related federal procurement rules require iron, steel, and manufactured products in federally funded projects to be domestically produced; DOE-funded hydrogen infrastructure projects (e.g. under BIL / IIJA H2Hubs) must comply with Buy America provisions. [UNVERIFIED: 45V final rule details subject to potential regulatory revision; verify current IRS guidance at irs.gov]
summary.zh: 《通货膨胀削减法》第 45V 条（2022年，Pub. L. 117-169）设立清洁氢生产税收抵免，对2022年后投入使用的合格设施生产的合格清洁氢，最高抵免额为每千克3.00美元。抵免等级取决于全生命周期温室气体排放强度：第1档（低于0.45 kgCO2e/kgH2）可享受全额3.00美元/千克；排放较高档次的抵免额较低。氢气须为在合格贸易或业务中出售或使用而生产。财政部和国税局于2025年1月发布最终法规（T.D. 10026），明确了电解制氢的全生命周期排放核算方法（45VH2-GREET模型）及能源属性证书（EAC）要求。另外，《购买美国产品法》（41 U.S.C. 8301-8305）及相关联邦采购规则要求联邦资助项目中的铁、钢及制造产品须为国内生产；DOE资助的氢气基础设施项目（如BIL/IIJA氢能枢纽项目）须遵守购买美国产品条款。[UNVERIFIED: 第45V条最终规则细节可能面临法规修订；请于 irs.gov 核实现行国税局指引]
summary.zht: 《通貨膨脹削減法》第 45V 條（2022年，Pub. L. 117-169）設立清潔氫生產稅收抵免，對2022年後投入使用的合格設施生產的合格清潔氫，最高抵免額為每千克3.00美元。抵免等級取決於全生命週期溫室氣體排放強度：第1檔（低於0.45 kgCO2e/kgH2）可享受全額3.00美元／千克；排放較高檔次的抵免額較低。氫氣須為在合格貿易或業務中出售或使用而生產。財政部和國稅局於2025年1月發布最終法規（T.D. 10026），明確了電解製氫的全生命週期排放核算方法（45VH2-GREET模型）及能源屬性證書（EAC）要求。另外，《購買美國產品法》（41 U.S.C. 8301-8305）及相關聯邦採購規則要求聯邦資助項目中的鐵、鋼及製造產品須為國內生產；DOE資助的氫氣基礎設施項目（如BIL/IIJA氫能樞紐項目）須遵守購買美國產品條款。[UNVERIFIED: 第45V條最終規則細節可能面臨法規修訂；請於 irs.gov 核實現行國稅局指引]

standards_or_laws: IRA 2022 Section 45V — Clean Hydrogen Production Tax Credit (Pub. L. 117-169)
IRS / Treasury T.D. 10026 (January 2025) — Final Regulations for Section 45V
45VH2-GREET Model — DOE Argonne National Laboratory lifecycle emissions model for 45V
DOE National Clean Hydrogen Strategy and Roadmap (2023) — energy.gov
Buy America Act (41 U.S.C. 8301-8305) — domestic content requirement for federal procurement
BIL / IIJA Section 40314 — Regional Clean Hydrogen Hubs (H2Hubs) program, including Buy America requirements
DOE Loan Programs Office — Title XVII loan guarantees for hydrogen projects

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to the IRA 45V tax credit. The Chinese government supports hydrogen production through industrial policy incentives under the 14th Five-Year Plan for hydrogen energy, NDRC and MIIT guidance documents, and local government subsidies (e.g. Guangdong, Beijing, Shanghai hydrogen demonstration zones). Green hydrogen production using renewable electricity is encouraged but there is no single lifecycle-emissions-based federal tax credit mechanism comparable to 45V. Buy America provisions have no equivalent in China; procurement of hydrogen equipment for state-owned enterprise projects may favour domestic suppliers under government procurement guidelines, but there is no explicit legal equivalent to the US statutory Buy America requirement. [UNVERIFIED: specific subsidy programmes vary by province and policy cycle; verify current incentives with NDRC guidance]
summary.zh: 中国没有与 IRA 第 45V 条税收抵免直接对应的机制。中国政府通过「十四五」氢能规划、国家发改委和工业和信息化部指导文件以及地方政府补贴（如广东、北京、上海氢能示范区）支持制氢产业。利用可再生电力生产绿色氢气受到鼓励，但尚无与 45V 类似的基于全生命周期排放的联邦税收抵免机制。中国没有与美国购买美国产品法等同的规定；国有企业氢能设备采购可能依据政府采购指引优先采用国内供应商，但并无与美国法定购买美国产品要求明确对应的法律规定。[UNVERIFIED: 具体补贴计划因省份和政策周期而异；须向国家发改委指引核实现行激励措施]
summary.zht: 中國沒有與 IRA 第 45V 條稅收抵免直接對應的機制。中國政府通過「十四五」氫能規劃、國家發改委和工業和信息化部指導文件以及地方政府補貼（如廣東、北京、上海氫能示範區）支持製氫產業。利用可再生電力生產綠色氫氣受到鼓勵，但尚無與 45V 類似的基於全生命週期排放的聯邦稅收抵免機制。中國沒有與美國購買美國產品法等同的規定；國有企業氫能設備採購可能依據政府採購指引優先採用國內供應商，但並無與美國法定購買美國產品要求明確對應的法律規定。[UNVERIFIED: 具體補貼計劃因省份和政策週期而異；須向國家發改委指引核實現行激勵措施]

standards_or_laws: NDRC / MIIT — Medium and Long-Term Plan for the Development of the Hydrogen Energy Industry (2021-2035)
NDRC Guidance on Hydrogen Energy Development (2022) — green hydrogen targets
Local government hydrogen demonstration subsidies (Guangdong, Beijing, Shanghai) [UNVERIFIED: programme details vary by jurisdiction and cycle]
State-owned enterprise government procurement guidelines (favoring domestic suppliers) [UNVERIFIED: not a statutory Buy America equivalent]

gap.en: The IRA 45V credit creates a powerful commercial incentive for US project developers to deploy clean-hydrogen electrolyzers that can demonstrate low lifecycle GHG emissions under the 45VH2-GREET model — specifically electrolyzers powered by additional, deliverable, time-matched renewable electricity. Chinese-manufactured electrolyzers can in principle qualify if the facility and project meet 45V requirements, but the Buy America provisions attached to federally funded H2Hubs and DOE loan programs may require domestically manufactured electrolyzer components, effectively excluding or disadvantaging Chinese-origin equipment in those project streams. Chinese subsidy mechanisms are fragmented, non-transferable to US projects, and carry no reciprocal recognition. A Chinese electrolyzer OEM targeting the US market must plan for 45V lifecycle-accounting documentation and assess Buy America exposure for any federally financed project.
gap.zh: IRA 第 45V 条税收抵免为美国项目开发商部署可在 45VH2-GREET 模型下证明低生命周期温室气体排放的清洁氢电解槽提供了强大的商业激励——尤其是以额外的、可交付的、时间匹配可再生电力驱动的电解槽。中国制造的电解槽在原则上可符合 45V 要求，但附加在联邦资助氢能枢纽和 DOE 贷款项目上的购买美国产品条款可能要求电解槽组件为国内制造，从而在这些项目渠道中对中国原产设备形成事实上的排除或劣势。中国的补贴机制分散、不可转移至美国项目，且不享有对等认可。以美国市场为目标的中国电解槽企业须为符合 45V 要求准备全生命周期核算文件，并评估任何联邦资助项目中的购买美国产品合规风险。
gap.zht: IRA 第 45V 條稅收抵免為美國項目開發商部署可在 45VH2-GREET 模型下證明低生命週期溫室氣體排放的清潔氫電解槽提供了強大的商業激勵——尤其是以額外的、可交付的、時間匹配可再生電力驅動的電解槽。中國製造的電解槽在原則上可符合 45V 要求，但附加在聯邦資助氫能樞紐和 DOE 貸款項目上的購買美國產品條款可能要求電解槽組件為國內製造，從而在這些項目渠道中對中國原產設備形成事實上的排除或劣勢。中國的補貼機制分散、不可轉移至美國項目，且不享有對等認可。以美國市場為目標的中國電解槽企業須為符合 45V 要求準備全生命週期核算文件，並評估任何聯邦資助項目中的購買美國產品合規風險。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary incentive — 45V is a tax credit, not a product mandate; Buy America is mandatory for federally funded projects only (not private-sector projects)
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent — hydrogen subsidies are discretionary government incentives, not statutory mandates

source.publisher: U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) — Office of Energy Efficiency and Renewable Energy

compliance_verdict.en: IRA 45V is a commercial demand driver, not a product-safety mandate: it incentivises low-GHG electrolytic hydrogen but does not itself bar Chinese-manufactured electrolyzers from the US market. However, Buy America provisions on federally funded H2Hub and DOE loan projects may create de facto barriers for Chinese-origin equipment in those channels. Exporters should verify current IRS 45V final-rule requirements and assess project-by-project Buy America exposure. This information is provided for general reference only and does not constitute legal, tax, or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: IRA 第 45V 条是商业需求驱动因素，而非产品安全强制要求：它激励低温室气体排放的电解制氢，但本身并不禁止中国制造的电解槽进入美国市场。但是，联邦资助氢能枢纽和 DOE 贷款项目的购买美国产品条款，可能对这些渠道中的中国原产设备形成事实上的壁垒。出口商应核实当前国税局第 45V 条最终规则要求，并逐项目评估购买美国产品合规风险。本信息仅供一般参考，不构成法律、税务或合规建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: IRA 第 45V 條是商業需求驅動因素，而非產品安全強制要求：它激勵低溫室氣體排放的電解製氫，但本身並不禁止中國製造的電解槽進入美國市場。但是，聯邦資助氫能樞紐和 DOE 貸款項目的購買美國產品條款，可能對這些渠道中的中國原產設備形成事實上的壁壘。出口商應核實當前國稅局第 45V 條最終規則要求，並逐項目評估購買美國產品合規風險。本資訊僅供一般參考，不構成法律、稅務或合規建議。
